headline: Amazon Taps Satellites And OpenAI Deal As Service Revenue Drivers
summary: Amazon.com (NasdaqGS:AMZN) has secured a major in-flight Wi-Fi contract for its Leo satellite network with Delta Air Lines, marking its first flagship U.S. airline deal. Amazon and OpenAI announced a multi-billion dollar partnership in which Amazon plans to invest US$50b in OpenAI. OpenAI plans to spend US$138b on AWS cloud services over eight years as part of the agreement. For investors following Amazon.com (NasdaqGS:AMZN), these moves highlight how the company is leaning on its satellite...

headline: Delta Resources to Attend NWOPA 2026 Showcase in Thunder Bay
summary: Toronto, Ontario--(Newsfile Corp. - March 31, 2026) - Delta Resources Limited (TSXV: DLTA) (OTC Pink: DTARF) (FSE: 6GO1) ("Delta" or "the Company") is pleased to announce that it will be attending the Northwest Ontario Prospectors Association ("NWOPA") Showcase, taking place April 8-9, 2026, at the Valhalla Inn in Thunder Bay, Ontario.The NWOPA Showcase is a key annual gathering for prospectors, exploration companies, investors, and industry stakeholders, focused on advancing mineral exploration
